boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: rehire activation while prior offboarding lock remains active.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No current source closure for rehire

final_answer: Action boundary open. Control record shows missing rehire clearance and active prior offboarding lock. No source closes dependency. Execution blocked. Escalate to obtain current lock release before any workforce or payroll change.
